from datetime import datetime, timezone

from sqlalchemy import select

from app.db import BeatSheet, CharacterSheet, ContinuityBible, Genre, Pitch, StoryBrief, StorySession, StorySetup, ToneProfile
from app.db.session import get_session_factory
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
SessionLocal = get_session_factory()

with SessionLocal() as session:
    genre = session.execute(
        select(Genre).where(Genre.slug == 'quest-fantasy')
    ).scalar_one_or_none()
    if genre is None:
        genre = Genre(
            slug='quest-fantasy',
            label='Quest Fantasy',
            description='A bedtime-safe harbor adventure.',
        )
        session.add(genre)
        session.flush()

    tone = session.execute(
        select(ToneProfile).where(ToneProfile.slug == 'hushed-wonder')
    ).scalar_one_or_none()
    if tone is None:
        tone = ToneProfile(
            genre=genre,
            slug='hushed-wonder',
            label='Hushed Wonder',
            description='Soft and luminous.',
            bedtime_notes='Keep every turn reassuring and visibly safe.',
        )
        session.add(tone)
        session.flush()

    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='Continuity QA Harbor')
    story_session = session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)
    story_session.selected_genre = genre
    story_session.selected_tone_profile = tone
    story_session.current_stage = WorkflowStage.BEATS
    story_session.resume_stage = WorkflowStage.BEATS
    story_session.furthest_completed_stage = WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS
    story_session.overall_status = WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS
    session.flush()

    stage_details = {
        WorkflowStage.GENRE: ('completed', 'Selected genre: Quest Fantasy.'),
        WorkflowStage.TONE: ('completed', 'Selected tone profile: Hushed Wonder.'),
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF: ('completed', 'Accepted normalized brief.'),
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES: ('completed', 'Accepted the harbor lantern pitch.'),
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS: ('completed', 'Locked the character sheet.'),
        WorkflowStage.BEATS: ('in_progress', 'Midpoint needs one more bedtime-soft pass.'),
    }
    for stage_state in story_session.workflow_stage_states:
        if stage_state.stage in stage_details:
            status, detail = stage_details[stage_state.stage]
            stage_state.status = WorkflowStageState(status)
            stage_state.detail = detail
            if status == 'completed':
                stage_state.completed_at = now
            elif status == 'in_progress':
                stage_state.started_at = now

    brief = StoryBrief(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        story_idea='A child follows floating lanterns across a harbor and helps a shy otter guardian bring them home.',
        desired_themes='Belonging, gentle courage, and a calm return home.',
        key_images='Lanterns on dark water, otter paws, and moonlit docks.',
        audience_notes='For an early-elementary read-aloud that stays cozy instead of suspenseful.',
        must_have_elements='End with every lantern home and the harbor quiet again.',
        raw_brief='A child follows floating lanterns across a harbor and helps a shy otter guardian bring them home.',
        normalized_summary='A harbor bedtime quest with a calm lantern-by-lantern reunion.',
        normalized_preferences={
            'setting': 'Juniper Harbor',
            'constraint_notes': ['End with the harbor settled and everyone tucked in.'],
            'bedtime_safety_concerns': ['Keep every surprise quickly reassuring.'],
            'candidate_motifs': ['floating lanterns', 'moonlit docks'],
        },
        planning_notes='Keep the midpoint more awestruck than tense.',
        is_active=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(brief)
    session.flush()

    pitch = Pitch(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        story_brief_id=brief.id,
        generation_key='pitch-batch-1',
        pitch_index=0,
        title='Lanterns Over Juniper Lake',
        logline='A child follows floating lanterns across a harbor and helps a shy otter guardian bring them home.',
        summary='The harbor will not settle until the final lantern finds its right doorstep.',
        bedtime_notes='Let wonder lead, and keep every turn buffered by company and light.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pitch)
    session.flush()

    character_sheet = CharacterSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        pitch_id=pitch.id,
        revision_number=12,
        title='Juniper Keeper Cast',
        protagonist_name='Mira',
        summary='A child and a shy otter guardian carry the story with a compact, bedtime-safe support cast.',
        character_data={
            'candidate': {
                'protagonist': {
                    'name': 'Mira',
                    'role': 'Curious harbor child',
                    'goal': 'Help every drifting lantern get home before the harbor sleeps.',
                    'flaw': 'She worries that one wrong step will disappoint everyone.',
                    'comfort_trait': 'She counts breaths while tracing lantern light on the dock.',
                    'relationships': ['Trusted by the otter guardian'],
                    'visual_anchors': ['knit night coat', 'small harbor satchel'],
                },
                'supporting_cast': [
                    {
                        'name': 'Pip',
                        'role': 'Otter guardian',
                        'goal': 'Guide each lantern to the right doorstep.',
                        'flaw': 'He hesitates when he thinks he has let someone down.',
                        'comfort_trait': 'He hums before speaking when the night feels uncertain.',
                        'relationships': ['Mira learns courage by helping Pip'],
                        'visual_anchors': ['lantern pole', 'river-stone pendant'],
                    }
                ],
                'visual_motifs': ['floating lanterns', 'moonlit docks', 'otter paws'],
            }
        },
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(character_sheet)
    session.flush()

    beat_sheet = BeatSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        character_sheet_id=character_sheet.id,
        revision_number=3,
        summary='A harbor Save-the-Cat arc that lands in calm belonging.',
        bedtime_notes='Keep each turn soft enough for bedtime, especially around the midpoint and all-is-lost beats.',
        beats={
            'bedtime_goal': 'Land in a visibly sleepy ending.',
            'beats': [
                {'key': 'opening_image', 'label': 'Opening Image', 'order': 1, 'summary': 'The harbor glows softly as Mira checks the last lanterns.'},
                {'key': 'midpoint', 'label': 'Midpoint', 'order': 9, 'summary': 'The hidden lantern map opens and shows the last route home.'},
                {'key': 'all_is_lost', 'label': 'All Is Lost', 'order': 11, 'summary': 'One lantern drifts off course and Mira thinks she has failed.'},
            ],
        },
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(beat_sheet)
    session.flush()

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1800,
        target_runtime_minutes=12,
        chapter_count=3,
        approximate_scene_count=9,
        chapter_style='three gentle chapters',
        guidance_notes='Let each chapter end on a calmer image than it began.',
        is_selected=False,
    )
    session.add(story_setup)
    session.flush()

    continuity_bible = ContinuityBible(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=3,
        source_stage=WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        source_summary='Accepted beat sheet: Harbor lantern return.',
        summary_text='Mira anchors the current story in Juniper Harbor. Protect the promise of helping every lantern home before sleep.',
        summary_data={
            'schema_version': 1,
            'facts': [
                {
                    'key': 'character:mira:1',
                    'category': 'character',
                    'title': 'Mira',
                    'detail': 'Curious harbor child who needs to trust that steady help is enough.',
                    'source_stage': 'characters',
                    'source_label': 'Juniper Keeper Cast',
                },
                {
                    'key': 'location:juniper-harbor:1',
                    'category': 'location',
                    'title': 'Juniper Harbor',
                    'detail': 'Use the harbor docks and lantern routes as the default world anchor.',
                    'source_stage': 'brief',
                    'source_label': 'Story brief',
                },
                {
                    'key': 'promise:lanterns-home:1',
                    'category': 'promise',
                    'title': 'Safe return promise',
                    'detail': 'Every drifting lantern reaches home before the harbor fully sleeps.',
                    'source_stage': 'beats',
                    'source_label': 'Revision 3',
                },
                {
                    'key': 'voice:guardrail:1',
                    'category': 'voice_constraint',
                    'title': 'Bedtime guardrail',
                    'detail': 'Keep every surprise luminous, buffered by company, and quick to settle.',
                    'source_stage': 'tone',
                    'source_label': 'Hushed Wonder',
                },
                {
                    'key': 'thread:midpoint:1',
                    'category': 'unresolved_thread',
                    'title': 'Midpoint reveal',
                    'detail': 'The hidden lantern map still needs a gentle explanation before the finale.',
                    'source_stage': 'beats',
                    'source_label': 'Revision 3',
                },
                {
                    'key': 'locked:chapter-1:1',
                    'category': 'locked_detail',
                    'title': 'Chapter 1: Lantern Wake',
                    'detail': 'Mira has already promised Pip that no lantern will drift alone tonight.',
                    'source_stage': 'composition',
                    'source_label': 'Segment 1',
                },
            ],
        },
        is_selected=True,
    )
    session.add(continuity_bible)
    session.commit()
    print(snapshot.id)
